deleteCard.description: This item and its history will be permanently removed.

empty.title: No conversations yet
empty.description: Start a new conversation to delegate work to an agent.

search.emptyDescription: Try a different search or clear the current one.
search.historyErrorDescription: Some older mission text could not be loaded.

chatEmpty.heading: What can I help with?
chatEmpty.subheading: Tap a skill to get started, or just type what you need below.

confirmArchive.title: Archive missions?

confirmArchive.description_other: Archive {{count}} missions? You can reopen them from the Archived tab.

confirmDelete.title: Delete missions?
confirmDelete.description_one: Permanently delete {{count}} mission and its history?
confirmDelete.description_other: Permanently delete {{count}} missions and their history?

doneArchive.confirmDescription_one: Archive {{count}} mission in Done? You can reopen it from the Archived tab.
doneArchive.confirmDescription_other: Archive {{count}} missions in Done? You can reopen them from the Archived tab.

archived.emptyDescription: Archived missions appear here. Reply to one to bring it back.
